title: Policy-as-Code (Open Policy Agent)
description: Implement authorization logic decoupling from the application layer using Open Policy Agent (OPA). Write Rego policies to enforce centralized, version-controlled access governance. Design auditable access control systems leveraging Policy-as-Code principles.
objectives: Implement authorization logic decoupling from the application layer using Open Policy Agent (OPA).
Write Rego policies to enforce centralized, version-controlled access governance.
Design auditable access control systems leveraging Policy-as-Code principles.
